mapper.select: SELECT A.CREATED_AT , A.WRITE_YEAR , A.DOC_TYPE , A.DOC_NO , A.USE_YN , (SELECT process_nm FROM ESG.TB_PROCESS_INFO WHERE PROCESS_ID = A.PROCESS_ID) AS PROCESS_NM , COUNT(B.HAZARDS_CLASSIFICATION) AS HAZARDS_CLASSIFICATION_CNT , A.PROCESS_ID , A.process_work_rev_no , A.write_dt , C.rev_nm as process_work_rev_nm FROM ESG.tb_classification_hazards A INNER JOIN ESG.TB_CLASSIFICATION_HAZARDS_DETAIL B ON A.WRITE_YEAR = B.WRITE_YEAR AND A.DOC_TYPE = B.DOC_TYPE AND A.DOC_NO = B.DOC_NO INNER JOIN ESG.TB_PROCESS_WORK_CNFM C ON A.PROCESS_ID = C.PROCESS_ID AND A.process_work_rev_no = C.REV_NO WHERE A.COMP_ID = #{compId} AND A.WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear} GROUP BY A.WRITE_YEAR,A.DOC_TYPE,A.DOC_NO,TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT,'YYYYMMDD'), C.REV_NM ORDER BY a.use_yn DESC, CAST(a.order_seq as int) ASC, a.created_at DESC

SELECT d.hazards_classification, e.class_nm, e.factor_id FROM esg.tb_classification_hazards c LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_detail d ON d.write_year = c.write_year AND d.doc_type = c.doc_type AND d.doc_no = c.doc_no AND d.write_year = #{writeYear} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_factor_mgmt e ON e.factor_id = d.hazards_type AND e.class_id = d.hazards_classification WHERE c.use_yn = 'Y' AND c.process_id = #{processId} AND c.process_work_rev_no = #{revNo} AND c.comp_id = #{compId} AND c.write_year = #{writeYear} GROUP by e.factor_id, d.hazards_classification, e.class_nm ORDER BY e.factor_id, d.hazards_classification, e.class_nm

SELECT A.process_id , A.process_nm , A.COMP_ID , b.rev_no , b.rev_nm , c.order_seq , c.USE_YN , c.write_year , c.doc_type , c.doc_no , c.write_dt , c.created_at , d.work_detail_id , d.content , d.work_type , e.doc_seq as detail_doc_seq , e.hazards_type , e.hazards_classification , e.hazards_type as factor_id , e.hazards_classification as class_nm , a.created_at AS resisted_at FROM esg.tb_process_info A INNER JOIN esg.tb_process_work_cnfm B ON A.PROCESS_ID = B.PROCESS_ID AND b.cnfm_yn = 'Y' and b.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ESG.tb_classification_hazards c ON C.process_id = A.process_id AND C.process_work_rev_no = B.rev_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey_detail d ON d.process_id = b.process_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_detail e ON e.write_year = c.write_year AND e.doc_type = c.doc_type AND e.doc_no = c.doc_no WHERE B.USE_YN = 'Y' --사용하는것만 AND A.COMP_ID = #{compId} AND C.write_year = #{writeYear} AND C.doc_type = 'CHD' AND C.doc_no = #{docNo}

SELECT A.PROCESS_ID , CONCAT(A.PROCESS_NM , ' (', C.rev_nm, '-', B.rev_no, ')') AS PROCESS_NM , A.COMP_ID , B.REV_NO --공정차수 , C.REV_NM --공정차수명 , B.WRITE_YEAR , B.DOC_TYPE , B.DOC_NO , B.USE_YN , B.CREATED_AT FROM esg.tb_process_info A INNER JOIN esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey B ON A.PROCESS_ID = B.PROCESS_ID AND A.COMP_ID = B.COMP_ID INNER JOIN esg.tb_process_work_cnfm C ON B.PROCESS_ID = C.PROCESS_ID AND B.REV_NO = C.REV_NO WHERE B.USE_YN = 'Y' --사용하는것만 AND B.COMP_ID = #{compId} AND B.CONFIRM_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.PROCESS_ID DESC;
SELECT CONTENT ,WORK_TYPE FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey_detail WHERE PROCESS_ID = #{processId} AND WORK_TYPE IN('equipment','msds') ORDER BY WORK_TYPE

SELECT B.HAZARDS_CLASSIFICATION ,B.HAZARDS_TYPE FROM ESG.tb_classification_hazards A INNER JOIN ESG.TB_CLASSIFICATION_HAZARDS_DETAIL B ON A.WRITE_YEAR = B.WRITE_YEAR AND A.DOC_TYPE = B.DOC_TYPE AND A.DOC_NO = B.DOC_NO WHERE A.PROCESS_ID =#{processId} AND A.DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND A.DOC_TYPE = #{docType} AND A.WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear}`

WITH tb_define AS ( SELECT A.factor_id , A.class_id , A.class_nm , A.ord_seq FROM esg.tb_classification_hazards_factor_mgmt A WHERE A.factor_id LIKE '%' || 'factor' || '%' AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.comp_id = #{compId} UNION ALL SELECT B.hazards_type , B.hazards_classification , A.class_nm , A.ord_seq FROM esg.tb_classification_hazards_factor_mgmt A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards_detail B ON A.factor_id = B.hazards_type AND A.class_id = B.hazards_classification WHERE B.doc_type = #{docType} AND B.doc_no = #{docNo} AND B.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(TD.factor_id) >= 2 THEN '■ ' || REPLACE(TD.factor_id, 'factor_', '') || '.' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION by TD.factor_id ORDER BY TD.factor_id) || ' ' || TD.class_nm ELSE '□ ' || REPLACE(TD.factor_id, 'factor_', '') || '.' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION by TD.factor_id ORDER BY TD.factor_id) || ' ' || TD.class_nm END || E'\n' AS class_nm , TD.factor_id FROM tb_define TD GROUP BY TD.factor_id, TD.ord_seq, TD.class_id, TD.class_nm ORDER BY TD.factor_id, TD.ord_seq, TD.class_id;
select t1.write_year , t1.doc_type , t1.doc_no , t1.comp_id from esg.tb_classification_hazards t1 where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y'
select t1.* from dataset.tb_dataset_classification_hazards_factor_mgmt t1 where t1.factor_id = #{searchText} and t1.use_yn = 'Y'
